labels: daily-brief, review

---

## Report date

YYYY-MM-DD

## File path

`daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md`

## Checklist

- [ ] Executive Summary has 5 high-signal items
- [ ] AI & Models section is current and sourced
- [ ] Coding & Developer Tools section includes practical builder insight
- [ ] Sri Lanka / CSE / Economy section avoids financial advice
- [ ] Global Markets section separates facts from interpretation
- [ ] Opportunity Radar includes coding, SaaS, Sri Lanka, and market-research ideas
- [ ] Deep Dive is clear and useful
- [ ] Watchlist for Tomorrow is actionable
- [ ] Sources are included
- [ ] Telegram alert is short and clean

## Notes
